modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to view Google Calendar in Outlook 365.

full_description_text: User wants to see Google Calendar in Outlook. They are using Outlook 365. They asked how to sync both calendars. Language barrier makes it hard to explain.
short_description: Unable to view Google Calendar in Outlook 365.
description: User wants to see Google Calendar in Outlook. They are using Outlook 365. They asked how to sync both calendars. Language barrier makes it hard to explain.
